findings.title: --min-rss helper documents inclusive semantics but implements exclusive filtering
findings.impact: The CLI help and helper docstring say workers using at least the configured RSS are kept, but the implementation returns true only when rss_mb is greater than min_rss_mb. Future readers will have to reconcile two different contracts before changing or debugging this filter, and operator-facing behavior can drift from the documented intent.
findings.fix: Make the helper contract and implementation match, preferably by using rss_mb >= min_rss_mb for the documented inclusive threshold or by updating the help/docstring to clearly say the threshold is exclusive.
